title: duroia duckei
intro: Duroia duckei, also known as the "conflict tree," is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest in South America, specifically in Brazil, Peru, and Colombia. The plant's bark and leaves have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Duroia duckei are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Duroia duckei is typically prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment for various health issues.
